owned_files.notes: 161 plant species catalogued. Schema: id, common_name, description, type (fruit/herb/vegetable/tree/flowering/vine/etc.), yield_kg_per_season, growth_multiplier, water_consumption, nutrient_uptake_n_p_k, ph_min/max, growth_temp_min/max_c, days_to_harvest, growth_stages (pipe-delimited), seasonal_growth, days_in_season, rotation_years, vendor_class, companion_plants. Heavy agriculture focus (crop plants, herbs, specialty crops like coffee/cacao/tea).

gaps: Medicinal/pharmaceutical plants (ginseng, turmeric, echinacea, St. John's wort)
Forest canopy species (oak, pine, cedar, birch, maple)
Grasses and turf species (lawn grasses, pasture grasses)
Aquatic & wetland plants (water lilies, cattails, reeds)
Edible wild plants & forageables (mushrooms, berries, greens)
Spice plants (pepper, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla, saffron)
summary: 161 mostly-crop plants present (15-20% of major species). Active: add medicinal, ornamental, forest, and forageable plants for wider ecosystem.
